description: Add killer micro-features to quantchat (messaging app). Enhance with: read receipts with animation states, message reactions (emoji picker with frequently used), voice messages with waveform visualization, pinned messages, message scheduling, link preview extraction, and contact sharing. Add these as new service classes and React components in src/.
steps: Create apps/quantchat/src/services/reactions.service.ts - MessageReactionsService class with methods: addReaction(messageId, emoji), removeReaction(messageId, emoji), getReactions(messageId). Track reaction counts, user lists, animation state
Create apps/quantchat/src/services/read-receipts.service.ts - ReadReceiptsService with markAsRead, markAsDelivered, getReceiptStatus. Support states: sent, delivered, read with timestamps
Create apps/quantchat/src/services/voice-message.service.ts - VoiceMessageService with startRecording, stopRecording, getWaveformData, getDuration. Generate waveform amplitude array from audio buffer
Create apps/quantchat/src/services/message-scheduler.service.ts - MessageSchedulerService with schedule(message, sendAt), cancel(scheduledId), getScheduled(conversationId). Validate future dates
Create apps/quantchat/src/services/link-preview.service.ts - LinkPreviewService with extractPreview(url) returning {title, description, imageUrl, siteName, favicon}. Parse Open Graph meta tags
Create apps/quantchat/src/services/pinned-messages.service.ts - PinnedMessagesService with pin(messageId), unpin(messageId), getPinned(conversationId). Limit max pins per conversation
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/MessageReactions.tsx - React component showing emoji reactions under messages with counts, add reaction button with picker
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/VoiceMessage.tsx - Component with play/pause, waveform bars visualization, duration display, playback speed control
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/LinkPreview.tsx - Card component showing extracted link metadata (image, title, description, domain)
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/ReadReceipts.tsx - Component showing delivery status icons (single check, double check, blue double check) with tooltip timestamps
Create vitest tests for all new services in apps/quantchat/src/__tests__/

Verify all new files compile with NODE_OPTIONS='' node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --strict --jsx react-jsx --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --noUnusedLocals --noUnusedParameters --noUncheckedIndexedAccess <files>
acceptance_criteria: 6 new service classes with proper TypeScript types, no 'any'
4 new React components with typed props interfaces
vitest tests covering core logic of each service (reactions add/remove, receipts state machine, scheduler validation, link parsing, pin limits)
All files compile without TypeScript errors
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --strict --jsx react-jsx --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --noUnusedLocals --noUnusedParameters apps/quantchat/src/services/reactions.service.ts apps/quantchat/src/services/read-receipts.service.ts apps/quantchat/src/services/voice-message.service.ts apps/quantchat/src/services/message-scheduler.service.ts apps/quantchat/src/services/link-preview.service.ts apps/quantchat/src/services/pinned-messages.service.ts
findings: All 93 tests passing. Prettier ran via lint-staged during commit. Used pinCounter to ensure deterministic ordering of pinned messages for tests. All TypeScript strict checks pass including noUncheckedIndexedAccess and noUnusedLocals/Parameters.
